About.title: About HatakeSocial
About.subtitle: Sweden-based • TCG community • Wholesale supply chain
About.description: HatakeSocial is our attempt to build two things at once — because they belong together. First: a chain of healthy suppliers that can move top-notch, high-quality TCG products across Europe. Reliable stock, clean product data, and fair logistics. Second: a social platform that pulls collectors together. A place to show your collection, find trades, message safely, and meet the people behind the binders. Our long-term goal is to strengthen local game shops too — with better discovery, clearer events, and eventually real partnerships that help the community grow offline.

features.bulkImportDesc: We source and import merch in bulk so stores can restock reliably and plan campaigns.
features.euDispatchDesc: Fast shipping within the EU, with clear product info and consistent packaging.
features.creditLineDesc: Are you a bit short on cash? Registered businesses are allowed to purchase on credit.

building.title: What HatakeSocial is building
building.socialDesc: Collections, messaging, trades, community posts, and profiles — built to help collectors find each other and feel safe doing business.
building.shopsDesc: Our long-term dream is to support local gaming shops and events across Europe — and eventually open / partner with shops to spread our passion for TCGs. We believe the best communities happen offline too: Friday Night Magic, prereleases, casual Commander nights, and tournaments where you make friends. The platform should make those moments easier to discover and join.

vision.title: The Vision
vision.text: We want HatakeSocial to be the place where collectors feel at home — and where stores feel supported. A clean supply chain makes the hobby healthier. A strong social network makes the hobby warmer.

ernst.name: Ernst-William Hertz
ernst.desc: An active Magic: The Gathering player from 2007-2017, returning in 2023. The sole designer and visionary behind the HatakeSocial platform.

patricia.name: Patricia Andersson
patricia.desc: Mother of Ernst-William, Patricia studied business economics and works as a prison officer. She proudly raised two Magic-playing children.

mark.name: Mark Lange Jensen
mark.desc: An avid gamer, dedicated beta tester, and a source of great moral support, Mark has been instrumental in shaping the user experience.

virre.name: Virre Van Zarate Abreu
virre.desc: A great entrepreneur with a keen business sense, Virre acts as our conventional manager, guiding our strategic growth and operations.

phoebe.name: Phoebe Wang
phoebe.desc: Our Chinese Partner who oversees merchandise production and serves as our key liaison for building our network and presence in China. Phoebe plays a crucial role in our global reach and quality assurance.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.text: Interested in partnering with us or have questions about our platform?
